title: The Vigilante: Fighting Hero of the West
writer: Arthur Hoerl, Lewis Clay, George H. Plympton
actors: Ralph Byrd, Ramsay Ames, Lyle Talbot
plot: The Vigilante, a masked government agent, is assigned to investigate the case of the "100 Tears of Blood", a cursed string of rare blood red pearls sought by a gang led by the unknown X-1 that may have been smuggled into the country.
